title: Family Life Protection
definition: Family Life Protect is an individual life cover that runs on an annual basis meant to protect individuals in times of bereavement or permanent disability. The minimum age of entry is 18 years and the maximum is 69 years (that is the customers that have turned 69 years of age cannot sign up for the product). The cover ceases at 70 years of age.
benefits: Relieves your loved ones from the financial burden upon bereavement Provides an emergency fund to meet expenses We will cover the loss of two limbs, both hands, total paralysis, loss of both eyes, or permanently bed-ridden attracts full payment of the sum assured We offer a permanent disability benefit: Loss of one limb, one hand, partial paralysis, loss of one eye attract a half payout of the sum assured.
eligibility: The minimum age of entry is 18 and maximum age is 68 (i.e. customers who turned 69 years of age cannot sign-up). The cover ceases at 70 years of age.
